disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absolute inability to pass urine for around 12 hours despite a constant, painful urge
trigger_question_examples: When did he last manage to pass any urine?
Is he able to wee at all, or nothing is coming out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He hasn't managed to pass any proper urine for about half a day now — he's desperate to go but nothing comes out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, constant pain low in the central abdomen above the pubic bone
trigger_question_examples: How bad is the pain and does anything ease it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The pain is low down in the middle of his tummy, above the pubic bone, and it's constant and severe — nothing eases it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous small-volume dribbling/leakage onto the bedsheets despite the inability to void voluntarily
trigger_question_examples: Is any urine leaking or dribbling at all?
Have the nurses noticed any wetness or leaking?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The nurses say there's a constant little dribble leaking onto the sheets, but he still can't actually wee to empty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Longstanding progressive weak/hesitant urinary stream over the past year
trigger_question_examples: Has his stream been getting weaker over time?
Any trouble starting to wee or a slow stream recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — over the last year his stream has got weaker and he has to wait for it to start.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Started an over-the-counter antihistamine yesterday for an itchy rash
trigger_question_examples: Has he started any new medicines or over-the-counter tablets recently?
Any new tablets, cold-and-flu or allergy medicines in the last day or two?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He started an over-the-counter antihistamine yesterday for an itchy rash — the packet is on his bedside table.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Regular prostate/waterworks tablet has been missed for the last two days
trigger_question_examples: Is he up to date with his usual prostate medication?
Has he missed any of his regular tablets recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His usual daily prostate tablet has been missed for the last couple of days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or shakes reported by the patient or nursing staff
trigger_question_examples: Does he feel hot and cold or unwell in himself apart from the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shakes — the nurses checked and his temperature is normal; it's really the pain and not being able to wee.
